titleStmt.title: SII 4.667: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 667. (A.R. No. 219 of 1892). See Ep. Ind., Vol. VI, p. 276, No. 6. ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara cōḍerāju śakavarṣamul 1054
gunēṁṭi yuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu mahājanamuna
ku nādiṁḍla niccina vrittulu vennebhaṭla kha 2 kommanabhaṭla kha 1
bollebhaṭla kha 2 mallebhaṭla kha 2 trilōcanabhaṭla kha 3 bādena kha 3
kāmanabhaṭla kha 3 Ādityabhaṭla kha 2 guṁḍeṣaḍaṁgavi[kha ]vēma
nabhaṭla kha 2 śebbana ghaḍiyaśāsula kha 2 paḍḍebhaṭla kha 2 prō
lebhaṭla kha 2 dāme kha 2 . Ī mahādēvaraku dīpaṁbuna
ku muṁdaṟumaṟaṁdi kāmana yiccina goṟiyalu 55 . vīni
ṁ jēkoni prōlebōyuṁḍu putrānupautrakamu nitya māneḍu
neyi vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu . yī kēśavadēvara dīpaṁbunakuṁ begga
ḍarēvaṇayyanāyakula yiccina goṟiyalu 55 . yī dē
varaka saraniyapeggaḍaguṁḍena dīpamu veṭṭiṁci yiccina
goṟiyalu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni prōlebōyutammuḍu
kuṁddanayu nalluṁḍu gāmeyunuṁ dama putrānupautra
ka mokkokaḍlumāneṁḍu sēsi neyigā reṁḍudīpaṁbulaku
nācaṁdrārkkamu nicca Aḍḍeṁḍu nē yiddaṟuṁ bōyaṁgalavāru 2
yī mahādēvara dīpaṁbunakuṁ beggaḍarēvaṇanāyaku
la yiccina goṟiyalu 55 . vīniṁ jiṟumāviṁḍi sabbara
ḍḍipūṁṭagā naṁgarēkakāpe sēkoni yācaṁdrārkkamuṁ
putrānupautrakamu nitya māneṁḍu vōyaṁgala
vāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 4.667 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
